question: How much capital has the food delivery subsidy war burned, and what are the per-order economics?

findings.claim: JD.com Q3 2025 net service revenues grew 30.8% YoY, indicating rapid marketplace and food delivery scaling
findings.data: Q3 2025: net revenues increased 14.9% to RMB299.1 billion. Net product revenues increased 10.5%. Net service revenues increased 30.8%. JD.com's marketplace and marketing revenues accelerated throughout 2024-2025: up 13% YoY in Q4 2024, with 3P order volume and 3P active users maintaining robust YoY increases, outpacing overall JD Retail growth.

findings.claim: JD.com full year 2024 revenue was RMB1,158.8 billion, with service revenues growing 8% and marketplace/marketing up 6% for full year
findings.data: FY2024: Net revenues RMB1,158.8B (+6.8% YoY). Product revenues +5.9%. Service revenues +10.8% in Q4, +8% for full year. Marketplace and marketing up 13% in Q4, 6% for full year. JD now reports three segments: JD Retail, JD Logistics, New Businesses.
